description: Verso: Accounts in Hebrew script. Dated in the month of Shawwāl but without a year. The paleography supports a dating estimate of 16th- or 17th-century. The accounting style is very terse, mostly relying on Hebrew alphanumerals. The recto contains an extensive halakhic text in Ladino according to FGP.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
